projectDescription: A free, multi-game trading card collection tracker for Magic: The Gathering, Pokémon, and One Piece that organizes holdings into binders, tracks live market prices, and surfaces portfolio value over time.
keyFeatures: Organize physical and digital card collections into named binders (up to 3 per account)
Support for Magic: The Gathering, Pokémon, and One Piece TCGs
Live market price tracking with daily USD value snapshots
Portfolio value chart showing collection value over time
Trade list — mark cards for trade and share a public trade list via a unique link
Public binder sharing — make any binder publicly viewable with a shareable URL
Full-text card search with filters (set, color, type, rarity, price range)
Public REST API (v1) for developers — no authentication required
publicApiSurface: GET /api/v1/binders/{id} — public binder with holdings and total value
GET /api/v1/binders/{id}/history — daily USD value history for a binder
GET /api/v1/trades/{token} — public trade list by share token
GET /api/v1/cards — search the normalized card catalog (q, game, limit params)
GET /api/v1/cards/{game}/{id} — single card with daily price history
